{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Lesser Elderspawn
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Lesser Elderspawn]] are considered small, defenseless animals of the [[Elder]] world.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
